Command modules for app, battery, bluetooth, clicks, flash, help, imaging, misc, pfs, resets, system, time, and windows.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initializes the command modules for app, battery, bluetooth, clicks, flash, help, imaging, misc, pfs, resets, system, time, and windows.
- **[app.py](app.py.md)**: Commands for managing applications, including listing, launching, removing, and checking availability.
- **[battery.py](battery.py.md)**: Commands to force battery charge state and get battery status in a device.
- **[bluetooth.py](bluetooth.py.md)**: Bluetooth command functions for airplane mode, preferences wipe, MAC address management, and name setting.
- **[clicks.py](clicks.py.md)**: Commands for simulating button clicks on a Pebble device, including short, long, and multiple clicks.
- **[flash.py](flash.py.md)**: Commands for erasing flash, calculating CRC, and getting PRF address in Pebble firmware.
- **[help.py](help.py.md)**: Functions for generating short and long help descriptions for commands in the PebbleCommander tool.
- **[imaging.py](imaging.py.md)**: Commands for imaging resources and recovery firmware using PebbleCommander.
- **[misc.py](misc.py.md)**: Defines the `audit_delay` command for the PebbleCommander to send an "audit delay" prompt command.
- **[pfs.py](pfs.py.md)**: Commands for preparing file creation and fragmenting the filesystem in the Pebble firmware.
- **[resets.py](resets.py.md)**: Commands for resetting, crashing, and performing factory resets on a device using PebbleCommander.
- **[system.py](system.py.md)**: Commands for retrieving version information and setting boot bits in the Pebble firmware.
- **[time.py](time.py.md)**: Commands to set the time and clear timezone settings using PebbleCommander.
- **[windows.py](windows.py.md)**: Commands for managing window and modal stacks, and taking screenshots in Pebble firmware.
